transcript: Speaker A: Ladies and gentlemen, you are not ready for this. Get ready!
on_screen_text: Helicopter Dash. Reward for 1st place is yours! Claim. Bank of India + ₹ 2,01,108 Credited to Account 0002. Congratulations! अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App 😍 [Download Zinglish App to become the richest person in your family 😍]. Credit Alert! Rs. 50,000.00 credited to DBFC Bank. Zinglish: English Speaking App.
summary: The ad uses a misleading hook showing fake game rewards and bank credit alerts to grab attention. It then prompts users to download the Zinglish English-learning app to become wealthy.
